📍
Office markers use district headquarters town coordinates (approximate)
The Office_Locations sheet submitted didn't have verified per-office addresses (all rows shared one location), so office markers above are placed at each district's headquarters town as a reasonable proxy — not the exact ITDA/ZO/DTDO street address. Replace with real coordinates anytime for precision.
